MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ryan L. Dahm, Esq. of Cook Collection Attorneys, PLC, Tel. 415.989.4730, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

Plaintiff's counsel stipulated to the judge pro tem.

RULING: At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court vacated its tentative ruling and ordered PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Etc. off calendar. Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
